findingsNew.title: Seeded-PPR recovery adds an unconditional missing compiled-module dependency
findingsNew.claim: code-graph-context.ts resolves and imports the Memory MCP compiled weighted-walk module at top level before SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_SEEDED_PPR_RANKING is checked, but the referenced dist/lib/graph/bfs-traversal.js artifact is absent from this checkout.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked .opencode/skills/**/bfs-traversal.* inventory; source files exist, but the required system-spec-kit/mcp_server/dist/lib/graph/bfs-traversal.js path does not. Checked that seeded-PPR flag gating occurs inside build/expand logic after module initialization.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: A local build step may create the Memory MCP dist artifact in some environments, but the checked-out tree does not guarantee it before importing code-graph-context.ts.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade or close if runtime startup guarantees the compiled dist artifact before code-graph-context.ts loads, or if the import becomes lazy behind the seeded-PPR flag and a flag-off/no-dist test covers it.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: CONDITIONAL: confidence differentiation write paths are gated, but code-graph-context.ts has a default-off load-time dependency that can break existing consumers before the PPR flag is checked.
traceabilityChecks.checklist_evidence: CONDITIONAL: checklist claims flag-off regression proof, but reviewed source depends on an absent compiled Memory MCP dist artifact at module load.

title: Seeded-PPR recovery adds an unconditional missing compiled-module dependency
claim: code-graph-context.ts resolves and imports a compiled Memory MCP dist module at top level before the seeded-PPR flag is checked; the referenced compiled artifact is absent in this checkout.
counterevidenceSought: Inventory searched for .opencode/skills/**/bfs-traversal.* and found source traversal files, but not the required system-spec-kit/mcp_server/dist/lib/graph/bfs-traversal.js path. Flag gate checked at code-graph-context.ts:452 and code-graph-context.ts:1112, after module initialization.
alternativeExplanation: Developer environments that build system-spec-kit before code-graph-context loads may not reproduce the failure, but the checked-out tree does not guarantee that artifact.
downgradeTrigger: Close or downgrade if the runtime guarantees compiled dist availability before module load, or if the import is lazy behind the PPR flag with a no-dist flag-off test.
affectedSurfaceHints: CI/test environments without built Memory MCP dist
recommendation: Lazily resolve/import the shared weighted-walk module inside the seeded-PPR branch, or depend on a source-level shared module that exists in the checked-out tree; add a flag-off/no-dist load test.

summary: Gated confidence metadata write paths align with spec, but top-level recovered-PPR dependency can break flag-off consumers before the PPR flag branch is reached.
Checklist verification assumes the recovered shared walker dependency is available; this iteration found the checked-out compiled dist target absent.

direction: confidence-differentiation flag write paths are obviously ungated
summary: Same-file and cross-file metadata changes are guarded by the edge-confidence flag; the active P1 is the separate recovered-PPR module-load dependency.

findingDetails.title: Seeded-PPR recovery adds an unconditional missing compiled-module dependency
findingDetails.scopeProof: Top-level await import() at code-graph-context.ts:32 runs for every module load, before shouldUseSeededPprRanking() is checked inside expandAnchor at line 452/457/1112, so it affects all consumers of code_graph_context, not only the flagged PPR path.
affectedSurfaceHints: CI/test environments without a built system-spec-kit/mcp_server dist
